svg.text: camera sticks up out of this area
Check off each wire as you solder it: [ ]1 [ ]2 [ ]3 [ ]4 [ ]5
- Wires on the UNDERSIDE (solder side); crossings OK.
- Match by NUMBER (works in black-and-white too).
- SCK/BUSY/DIO1 (1,6,7) are on row 14, keep short.
- Socket the WHOLE radio (16 pads): leaves DIO2/TXEN/
RXEN reachable if power-up needs them.
- A on right, X on left. The only spacing that must
be exact: 10 holes between the 2 Freenove strips.
